records.question: What actors named Don Brockett are male and associated with any characters?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT actor.actorid FROM actor
JOIN characters ON actor.actorid = characters.actorid
WHERE actor.name = 'Don Brockett' AND actor.gender = 'Male'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ActorID FROM actor AS T1 INNER JOIN characters AS T2 ON T1.ActorID = T2.ActorID WHERE T1.Name = 'Don Brockett' AND T1.Gender = 'Male'
